langOffer:

mainMenu.en:
👋 *Hi, I'm Ravindu Shehara's Web Agent*
Owner of ravindushehara.me

How can we build your web presence today?

1. 📜 View Packages & Pricing
2. 💻 View My Portfolio
3. 🚀 Get a Custom Quote
4. 📞 Contact Info

*Type the number of your choice (e.g., 1).*
mainMenu.si:
👋 *ආයුබෝවන්, මම රවිඳු ෂෙහාරාගේ වෙබ් සහායක*
ravindushehara.me නියෝජිතයා

අද ඔබේ ව්‍යාපාරික වෙබ් අඩවිය අපි නිර්මාණය කරමුද?

1. 📜 මිල ගණන් සහ පැකේජ බලන්න
2. 💻 පසුගිය නිර්මාණ (Portfolio)
3. 🚀 නව වෙබ් අඩවියක් සඳහා විමසීම්
4. 📞 සම්බන්ධ වීමට

*පිළිතුරේ අංකය ටයිප් කරන්න (උදා: 1).*

portfolio.en:
Hi 👋 Here are some of our recent web development projects categorized for you:

🛒 **E-commerce Websites**

* Mobile Mart → https://mobile-mart.vercel.app
* Celluz Online Shop → https://celluz-online-shop.vercel.app
* Westnahira Cellularz → https://westnahira-cellularz-three.vercel.app

🏢 **Business / Service Websites**

* The Gentry Cut → https://the-gentry-cut.vercel.app
* Gentry Cut Saloon → https://gentry-cut-saloon.vercel.app
* Kade Mart → https://kade-mart.vercel.app

🌍 **Travel / Content Websites**

* Ceylon Journeys → https://ceylon-journeys.vercel.app
* Serranid Lanka Vibes → https://serranid-lanka-vibes.vercel.app

📊 **Web Applications / Systems**

* Project Management System → https://project-management-omega-nine.vercel.app
* Health Tracker → https://health-tracker-gamma-navy.vercel.app
* Edu Wave → https://edu-wave-neon.vercel.app

🎨 **Portfolio / Personal Websites**

* Ravindu Works → https://ravindu-works.vercel.app
* Developers Journey → https://developers-journey.vercel.app

💬 Let us know what type of website you need, and we’ll help you get started with a quote!

contact.en:
📞 *Contact Info*:

Web: ravindushehara.me
Or feel free to leave a message here, I'll get back to you personally!
